name: Poached Raspberry Pears
recipeIngredient: 3 firm Bosc pears, peeled and cut into fourths
recipeInstructions: Bosc pears are perfect here as they hold up well to cooking; firm Anjous can also be used. Apricot spreadable fruit would make a nice flavor and color variation in place of the raspberry. Mix all ingredients except pears in 10-inch skillet. Add pears. Heat to boiling; reduce heat to medium-low. Simmer uncovered for 30 minutes, spooning juice mixture over pears and stirring every 10 minutes until pears are tender. Serve warm or chilled.
